name: manifest-7-steps
description: Roxie Nafousi's 'Manifest: 7 Steps to Living Your Best Life' — a practical guide to manifestation combining neuroscience, quantum physics, and spiritual wisdom. Covers the seven steps: clear vision, removing fear and doubt, aligning behavior, overcoming tests, embracing gratitude, turning envy into inspiration, and trusting the universe.
useCase: Understanding the practice of manifestation, clarifying your goals and vision, removing fear and self-doubt, aligning your actions with your intentions, and trusting the universe to deliver what you desire.
knownRisks: Rooted in law of attraction and quantum physics interpretations that some scientists dispute
May feel too 'woo-woo' for skeptical readers
The author's personal story is extraordinary — realistic expectations needed
Not a substitute for professional mental health treatment
